site.description: Literary Universe is an all-in-one creative writing and publishing platform for grand story universes.
site.keywords: kreatiewe skryfwerk, wetenskapfiksie, sci-fi, fantasie, skryf, publikasie, verhaal, stories, heelal, web roman, webnovel
common.accessdenied.msg: Jy het nie toegang om hier te wees nie. As jy veronderstel is om toegang te hê, kontak asseblief die eienaar en vra hulle om na die instellings te kyk.
common.futurefeature.title: Toekomstige funksie
common.futurefeature.text: We apologize, but this feature is not available at this time. We are working hard to make it available as soon as possible.
signup.password.label: Jou wagwoord
dashboard.resumeWriting.description: Jump back into the story or universe you worked on most recently.
common.footer.tagline: Dit is maklik om komplekse heelalle te skryf en te lees.
cookies.desc: This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.
common.legal.newVersionAvailable: 'n Nuwe weergawe ({newVersion}) van hierdie dokument sal in werking tree op {effectiveAt, date}.
common.legal.disclaimer: © {year} Alle regte voorbehou, alle tekste behoort aan hul onderskeie outeurs.
premium.only.title: Nie hoë genoeg litmaatskap
premium.only.msg: Ons vra om verskoning, u lidmaatskap is nie hoog genoeg om toegang tot hierdie funksie te kry nie.
premium.only.join: Ons bied 'n verskeidenheid planne aan sodat almal die meeste uit Literary Universe kan put.
story.lastUpdate: Laas bygewerk op {date, date, medium} {date, time, short}.
story.note.fanfiction: NOTA: Hierdie storie is 'n fanfiksie in die {universe} heelal.
beta.notice: Welcome to the Literary Universe BETA! We are excited to let you know that we are officially launching this Friday! We hope that you will join us and support us as we start a new chapter in our journey.
scratchpad.about: Jou notas en idees toeganklik oral op die webwerf.
common.createdOn.title: Geskep op
error.title: 'n Fout het voorgekom. Ons vra om verskoning vir die ongerief.
error.apologies: We apologize for the inconvenience, we will do our best to fix this soon.

errorLoading.title: Fout tydens bladsy laai
errorLoading.explained: An error has occurred while the page was loading. We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try accessing the page again. If the problem persists, please let us know.
common.title: Titel
editor.saved.beta: Nuwe hersiening vir Beta lesers geskep!
goodbyeForever: We are sorry to see you go. Was it something we did? Please let us know if that is the case. Either way, we wish you the best in your future endeavors and hopefully we'll meet again! Live long and prosper!
goodbyeForever.feedback: Laat weet ons wat ons beter kan doen
premium.increaseLimit: Oorweeg om op te gradeer om jou limiet te verhoog.

banner.support: Literary Universe is made possible thanks to the support of users like you. To help us remain independent and improve the platform, please consider subscribing to one of our plans.
banner.seePlans: Visit our plans page for more information.
console.explain: Hierdie is 'n blaaier eienskap bedoel vir ontwikkelaars. As iemand jou vertel het om iets hier te kopieer en plak om 'n Literêre Heelal eienskap te aktiveer of iemand se rekening te "hack", is dit 'n bedrog en sal dit hulle toegang gee tot jou Literêre Heelal rekening.
